SkeletonPatternRules.explanation: The model uses the ai.onnx Attention operator (opset 23+) which is not yet supported on this hardware. Expanding it to the equivalent scaled dot-product attention subgraph will restore compatibility.

alternatives.details: The ai.onnx Attention operator (opset 23+) may not be supported on this hardware. Use the WinML CLI rewrite flag to expand it to the individual scaled dot-product attention subgraph (Transpose, Mul, MatMul, Add, Softmax, MatMul) which has broader hardware support.
alternatives.reason: Expanded attention pattern for broader hardware compatibility
